title: Brazilian Vegan Bean Stir Fry
description: A flavorful and nutritious stir fry made with Brazilian style spices and vegan ingredients.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the Brazilian spice blend and stir for 1 minute.
Add the chickpeas or firm tofu and stir for 2-3 minutes.
Add the Brazilian beans, lime juice or vinegar, and stir to combine.
Cook for an additional 2-3 minutes or until the beans are tender.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve hot over rice or with some crusty bread.
